name: East Balcony
description:
As you enter this balcony you see the glow of the rising sun orange and
reds against the clouds. You look over the railing out across the country and
you see the gardens in bloom, with moisture drops of dew on them glistening
in the early morning lite..as you look across the field you see doe and
thier young drinking at the stream. This is a pleasant place with comfy
wooden chairs to sit and watch the day break.
